title: The customer.
lede: Who we're building for, and what changes for them.

primary.title: [Primary persona]
primary.description: [Placeholder] One-paragraph description of who they are, what they care about, what they're trying to get done.

beforeAfter.beforeDescription: [Placeholder] Today, work is scattered — boards, files, chat, people's heads. No one has the full picture.
beforeAfter.afterDescription: [Placeholder] Everything lives in one container — visible to the team, accessible by every agent.

beforeAfter.beforeDescription: [Placeholder] Agents work in isolation. Outputs scatter across tools.
beforeAfter.afterDescription: [Placeholder] Humans + agents collaborate on the same outcome, in the same place.

beforeAfter.beforeDescription: [Placeholder] Adopting agents feels risky — no boundaries, no visibility.
beforeAfter.afterDescription: [Placeholder] Permissions inherit. Visibility is built-in. Teams adopt with confidence.
